commands.review_summary:
The PR makes `sessions_spawn` ACP argument redaction idempotent for already-redacted `resumeSessionId` and `streamTo` values and adds a focused regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main re-copies already-redacted ACP `sessions_spawn` arguments, and signed-thinking replay treats that sanitizer identity change as unsafe. I did not run a live repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer real behavior proof for the extended-thinking `sessions_spawn` replay path before merge; there is no narrow automated code repair to perform.
